requirement_topic.en: NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 Safety Standard — Heat Pumps, Air Conditioners and Dehumidifiers (INN)
requirement_topic.zh: NCh/IEC 60335-2-40安全标准——热泵、空调器和除湿机（INN）
requirement_topic.zht: NCh/IEC 60335-2-40安全標準——熱泵、空調器和除濕機（INN）

summary.en: Chile's Instituto Nacional de Normalización (INN) adopts IEC and EN international standards as NCh (Norma Chilena) national standards. For heat pumps and air conditioners, the applicable safety standard is NCh IEC 60335-2-40, which mirrors IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers). This standard forms the technical basis for SEC mandatory product approval (Sello SEC). Test reports to NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 from SEC-accepted laboratories are required to support the SEC certification filing; INN-published editions of the NCh standard must be used.
summary.zh: 智利国家标准化研究院（INN）将IEC和EN国际标准采纳为NCh（智利国家标准）。热泵和空调器适用的安全标准为NCh IEC 60335-2-40，与IEC 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器安全——电热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）相对应。该标准构成SEC强制产品认证（SEC印章）的技术基础。须提交SEC认可实验室出具的NCh/IEC 60335-2-40测试报告以支持SEC认证申报；须使用INN发布的NCh标准版本。
summary.zht: 智利國家標準化研究院（INN）將IEC和EN國際標準採納為NCh（智利國家標準）。熱泵和空調器適用的安全標準為NCh IEC 60335-2-40，與IEC 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器安全——電熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）相對應。該標準構成SEC強制產品認證（SEC印章）的技術基礎。須提交SEC認可實驗室出具的NCh/IEC 60335-2-40測試報告以支持SEC認證申報；須使用INN發布的NCh標準版本。

standards_or_laws: NCh IEC 60335-2-40 — Seguridad de los aparatos electrodomésticos y análogos — Requisitos particulares para bombas de calor, acondicionadores de aire y deshumidificadores eléctricos
IEC 60335-2-40 (international basis adopted by INN as NCh)
SEC mandatory product approval process referencing NCh safety standards

summary.en: China's safety standard for heat pump and air conditioner products is GB 4706.32 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for air conditioners), which is technically derived from IEC 60335-2-40 but diverges in specific requirements, test conditions, and component acceptability. CCC test reports issued to GB 4706.32 by Chinese certification bodies are not accepted as NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 compliance evidence for Chilean SEC purposes. Re-testing to the INN-current NCh edition at an SEC-accepted laboratory is required.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调器产品的安全标准为GB 4706.32（家用和类似用途电器安全——空调器的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-40，但在特定要求、测试条件和零部件可接受性方面存在差异。中国认证机构依据GB 4706.32签发的CCC测试报告不被接受为智利SEC目的的NCh/IEC 60335-2-40合规证据。须在SEC认可实验室按INN现行NCh版本重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調器產品的安全標準為GB 4706.32（家用和類似用途電器安全——空調器的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-40，但在特定要求、測試條件和零部件可接受性方面存在差異。中國認證機構依據GB 4706.32簽發的CCC測試報告不被接受為智利SEC目的的NCh/IEC 60335-2-40合規證據。須在SEC認可實驗室按INN現行NCh版本重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: particular requirements for air conditioners
CCC safety certification test reports (GB 4706.32 basis)
GB 9237 — Refrigerating systems and heat pumps: safety and environmental requirements

gap.en: GB 4706.32-based CCC test reports are not accepted by SEC Chile as NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 compliance evidence. Re-testing at an SEC-accepted laboratory to the current INN edition of NCh IEC 60335-2-40 is required to support the Sello SEC filing. Since Chile and China share 220 V 50 Hz, no voltage or frequency re-configuration is required — a significant advantage compared with markets operating at different voltages or frequencies.
gap.zh: 基于GB 4706.32的CCC测试报告不被SEC智利接受为NCh/IEC 60335-2-40合规证据。须在SEC认可实验室按INN现行版NCh IEC 60335-2-40重新测试，以支持SEC印章认证申报。由于智利和中国同为220 V 50 Hz，无需进行电压或频率重新配置——与采用不同电压或频率的市场相比，这是显著优势。
gap.zht: 基於GB 4706.32的CCC測試報告不被SEC智利接受為NCh/IEC 60335-2-40合規證據。須在SEC認可實驗室按INN現行版NCh IEC 60335-2-40重新測試，以支持SEC印章認證申報。由於智利和中國同為220 V 50 Hz，無需進行電壓或頻率重新配置——與採用不同電壓或頻率的市場相比，這是顯著優勢。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 is the technical basis for SEC mandatory product approval; testing required before Sello SEC can be issued
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 4706.32 for CCC domestic certification; GB 4706.32 reports not accepted by SEC Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 testing at an SEC-accepted laboratory is required; CCC/GB 4706.32 reports not accepted. Grid compatibility (220 V 50 Hz identical to China) eliminates voltage/frequency re-design risk.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——须在SEC认可实验室完成NCh/IEC 60335-2-40测试；CCC/GB 4706.32报告不被接受。电网兼容性（220 V 50 Hz与中国相同）消除了电压/频率重新设计的风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——須在SEC認可實驗室完成NCh/IEC 60335-2-40測試；CCC/GB 4706.32報告不被接受。電網兼容性（220 V 50 Hz與中國相同）消除了電壓/頻率重新設計的風險。
